ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(RecordType.DeveloperName = 'PAYE', IP_PassToTempest__c = TRUE, OR( NOT(ISPICKVAL(IP_Status__c , 'Active')), ISBLANK(TEXT( IP_NewStarterTaxStatus__c )), NOT(ISBLANK(IP_Candidate__r.IP_MCPAYE__c)), /*AND(IP_Candidate__r.IP_EarliestExpiringComplianceDate__c < Today(), NOT(IP_Candidate__r.IP_CitizenshipGroup__c= "Citizen of the UK")), ISBLANK(TEXT( IP_StudentLoan__c )),*/ /*NOT(ISBLANK( IP_Candidate__r.IP_WorkerStartDate__c )),*/ ISBLANK( IP_Candidate__r.sirenum__National_Insurance__c ), ISBLANK( IP_Candidate__r.Birthdate ), ISBLANK(TEXT( IP_Candidate__r.ts2__EEO_Gender__c )), ISBLANK(TEXT( IP_PaymentType__c )), ISBLANK(IP_PayrollID__c), NOT(ISBLANK(IP_Candidate__r.IP_MCPAYE__c)), IF(AND(ISPICKVAL(IP_PaymentType__c,'BACS'), ISBLANK( IP_BankAccountName__c ), OR(ISBLANK( IP_AccountNumber__c ),ISBLANK( IP_BuildingSocietyNumber__c )) ), TRUE, FALSE) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Pass to Tempest can be checked only for Fully Compliant PAYE PAY profile
